title: NFTs & Digital Ownership
subtitle: Beyond JPEGs — Utility, Credentials, and Rights
description: Understand NFTs as more than collectibles — soul-bound tokens, on-chain credentials, access passes, and digital rights management. Build with ERC-721 and ERC-1155.

lessons.title: NFT Standards
lessons.description: ERC-721, ERC-1155, and ERC-404 — what each does and when to use them.

lessons.title: Soul-Bound Tokens
lessons.description: Non-transferable NFTs for credentials, identity, and achievements.
lessons.topics: SBTs, Credential design, On-chain identity, Attestations

lessons.title: Metadata & Storage
lessons.description: How NFT metadata works — IPFS, Arweave, on-chain vs off-chain storage.
lessons.topics: IPFS, Arweave, On-chain metadata, Permanent storage

lessons.title: NFT Access Systems
lessons.description: Token-gating with NFTs — access passes, membership tiers, and gating strategies.
lessons.topics: Token gating, Access control, Membership tiers, Balance checks

lessons.title: Dynamic NFTs
lessons.description: NFTs that change based on on-chain or off-chain data — use cases and implementation.
lessons.topics: Dynamic metadata, Oracle integration, Evolving NFTs, Game state

lessons.title: Deploying an NFT
lessons.description: Step-by-step: deploy, mint, and verify an NFT contract on Base.
